title: AttendanceRecord
description: Per-athlete-per-session check-in event. Carries tenant_id (CASCADE) + session_id (RESTRICT) + athlete_id (RESTRICT) + athlete_enrollment_id (RESTRICT) + optional consumed_pass_id (RESTRICT) + optional membership_id (RESTRICT) + optional checked_in_by_user_id (RESTRICT). Cascades organization + region + branch through session.venue → branch. NEVER carries application_id, organization_id, region_id, or scope_node_id directly.

session_id.description: The session being attended. IMMUTABLE post-create.

athlete_enrollment_id.description: The roster row the athlete is attending via. IMMUTABLE post-create.

consumed_pass_id.description: The Pass atomically consumed at check-in. NULL when session.requires_pass=false OR trial/free/drop-in path. RESTRICT — the money-side reference cannot be lost. IMMUTABLE once set.

membership_id.description: The membership from which the Pass was consumed. Denormalised for indexed filtering. NULL for trial/free/drop-in.

status.description: Enum: not_yet_checked_in / present / late / left_early / present_with_note.

checked_in_at.description: IMMUTABLE. The event fingerprint — the moment the check-in was recorded.

checked_in_via.description: Enum: self_kiosk / coach_verified / admin_recorded / geofence / qr_scan. IMMUTABLE.

checked_in_by_user_id.description: The User (coach / admin / kiosk-authed athlete) who performed the check-in. NULL for anonymous kiosk sessions.

checked_out_at.description: For sessions with mandatory check-out or partial-attendance tracking. Idempotent — cannot be set twice.

left_early_reason.description: Free-text reason when athlete left early.

session_notes.description: Coach-only per-attendance note. NEVER surfaced to guardians / athletes / peers.

signature_url_signed.description: S3 signed URL for coach signature on paper roster. Optional per policy.

device_fingerprint_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of client-side device fingerprint. REQUIRED for checked_in_via='self_kiosk' or 'qr_scan'. Used for fraud correlation.

ip_address.description: Source IP address of the check-in. Fraud-correlation only; never surfaced to analytics.

gps_lat.description: Latitude in decimal degrees. REQUIRED for checked_in_via='geofence'.

gps_lng.description: Longitude in decimal degrees. REQUIRED for checked_in_via='geofence'.

indexes.name: attendance_records_unique
indexes.description: One AttendanceRecord per (session, athlete). Cancel + re-create to correct.

indexes.name: attendance_records_by_athlete_time_idx
indexes.description: Feeds athlete detail page + guardian dashboard reverse-chronological view.

indexes.name: attendance_records_consumed_pass_idx
indexes.description: Reverse lookup for CleanupOrphanCheckinsJob — given a Pass, find its consuming attendance.

indexes.name: attendance_records_fingerprint_idx
indexes.description: Fraud-correlation lookup — same fingerprint across N athletes flags for review.

x-invariants: One AttendanceRecord per (tenant_id, session_id, athlete_id) via partial unique index (deleted_at IS NULL)
Mutual exclusion with AbsenceRecord — no (session, athlete) can have both an AttendanceRecord and an AbsenceRecord
tenant_id + session_id + athlete_id + athlete_enrollment_id + checked_in_at + checked_in_via are IMMUTABLE post-create
consumed_pass_id + membership_id are IMMUTABLE once set (cancel + re-create to re-attribute)
gps_lat + gps_lng required together (both or neither) when checked_in_via = 'geofence'
For minor athletes: checked_in_via IN ('self_kiosk', 'geofence', 'qr_scan') refuses when the parent Athlete lacks consent_snapshot.device_fingerprint_consent OR gps_consent

status transitions: not_yet_checked_in → present / late; present → left_early / present_with_note; late → left_early / present_with_note. Terminal states (left_early, present_with_note) have no forward transitions
Status corrections only allowed within 48h of session.ends_at without admin_override permission
checked_out_at, when set, must be >= checked_in_at
